specific_question: By Q3 2026, how many AI-assisted supplier evaluation models will the asset lifecycle management team at Elexion Automotive have tested to improve sourcing reliability for EV production lines?
answer: According to internal documentation, by September 30, 2026, the asset management team is expected to have tested 24 AI-assisted supplier evaluation models.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Elexion Automotive apply digital twins enhanced with AI-driven digital engineering capabilities to enable scalable customization of EV models for mid-income families, while maintaining sustainable resource usage and reducing production costs?
